tasks.title: Coral Language Comprehensive Review
tasks.description: Conduct complete architectural review of the Coral language implementation including lexer, parser, AST, semantic analysis, MIR, codegen, and runtime
tasks.result: Comprehensive review completed. Identified 4 P0 critical issues, 7 P1 high-priority issues, and multiple P2 medium-priority improvements. Generated detailed technical report (COMPREHENSIVE_REVIEW_REPORT.md) and 16-week remediation plan (REMEDIATION_PLAN.md). Key findings: solid architectural foundation with critical gaps in memory management, type system, and code organization. Runtime monolith (4,823 LOC) requires immediate refactoring.

tasks.title: Runtime File Extraction (P0)
tasks.description: Split the monolithic runtime/src/lib.rs (4,823 LOC) into focused modules: value.rs, collections/list.rs, collections/map.rs, string.rs, memory.rs

tasks.title: Implement Cycle Detection (P0)
tasks.description: Add weak references and Bacon-Rajan cycle collector to prevent memory leaks from cyclic data structures like linked lists and graphs

tasks.title: Fix Generic Type Instantiation (P0)
tasks.description: Implement proper generic type instantiation so List[T] and Map[K,V] provide actual compile-time type safety instead of treating everything as Any
